description: Triggers when user needs to plan page hierarchy, navigation structure, URL patterns, or internal linking strategy
should_trigger: Plan the page hierarchy for my SaaS marketing site
Design the URL structure for my ecommerce store
How should I organize my website navigation?
Create an information architecture for my blog
Design the site structure and breadcrumbs for my app
Map out the internal linking strategy for my content site
I need a visual sitemap for planning my website
should_not_trigger: Generate sitemap.xml for my Next.js app
Run an SEO audit on my site
